name: a declared stack namespace with no probe group is reported in unprobed_in_scope, not silently dropped
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add sarif --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["unprobed_in_scope"].include?("sarif") ? 0:1)' && echo declared-noprobe-reported 1>&2
